lobe.name: Pando.Diagnostics
lobe.title: Pando Diagnostics LOBE
lobe.description: Wraps the pre-existing Pando.Diagnostics module as a DIDComm LOBE. Exposes server date/time retrieval via diagnostics/1.0/date-query for clock-skew detection and round-trip latency measurement.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Diagnostics Date Query
protocols.description: Requests the current server UTC date/time from the target TDA. Delegates to Get-TDADate from Pando.Diagnostics.Impl.psm1. Body: no required fields. Optional: { replyEndpoint }.

protocols.title: Diagnostics Date Result
protocols.description: Inbound reply to a date-query request. Body: serverUtc, serverUtcOffset, currentEpoch, respondedAt. Terminal — no reply is sent.

cmdlets.name: Get-TDADate
cmdlets.description: Returns the TDA server's current date and time as a DateTimeOffset (UTC). Defined in Pando.Diagnostics.Impl.psm1; re-exported for use by other LOBEs.
